User.title: User
User.description: A user of the GAMES HUB INDIA platform.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile photo.

role.description: The user's role on the platform.

claimedEvents.description: List of event IDs that the user has already claimed.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user was created.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: An event created by an Owner or Manager to reward users with GHI Coins.

id.description: The unique identifier for the event.

rewardAmount.description: The amount of GHI Coins rewarded for participating.

createdBy.description: The UID of the Owner or Manager who created the event.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the event was created.

isActive.description: Whether the event is currently active.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles and GHI Coin balances.

/events/{eventId}.description: Stores events created by Owners and Managers.
